description: WSDOH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Washington.
citation: WAC 246-320 / Washington State Hospital Licensing Rules

description: WSDOH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear floor area; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per bed.
WSDOH: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
WSDOH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
WSDOH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
WSDOH: Operating rooms 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered supply.
WSDOH: All hospital construction and renovation projects require WSDOH facility program review and plan approval. Seismic compliance required per Washington State Building Code.
WSDOH: Washington requires seismic hazard mitigation for all new hospital construction. Essential facilities must meet Occupancy Category IV per ASCE 7.
citation: Washington State Building Code Council / ASCE 7 Occupancy Category IV
